# utils

```go
import "github.com/sweet-juice/sweetjuice/cmd/utils"
```

Package utils provides shared cross\-platform utility functions for file I/O, networking, and process execution.

<a name="CommandExists"></a>
## func CommandExists

```go
func CommandExists(name string) bool
```

CommandExists returns true if the specified command is available in the system PATH.

<a name="CopyDirectory"></a>
## func CopyDirectory

```go
func CopyDirectory(scrDir, destDir string) error
```

CopyDirectory recursively copies a directory and its contents from scrDir to destDir.

<a name="DirEmpty"></a>
## func DirEmpty

```go
func DirEmpty(path string) bool
```

DirEmpty returns true if the directory is empty or cannot be opened.

<a name="DirExists"></a>
## func DirExists

```go
func DirExists(path string) bool
```

DirExists returns true if the specified path exists and is a directory.

<a name="DownloadFile"></a>
## func DownloadFile

```go
func DownloadFile(url string, dest string) error
```

DownloadFile retrieves a file from the given URL and saves it to the specified destination path.

<a name="Fatal"></a>
## func Fatal

```go
func Fatal(msg string, err error)
```

Fatal prints a formatted error message to stderr and exits the process with status 1.

<a name="FileExists"></a>
## func FileExists

```go
func FileExists(path string) bool
```

FileExists returns true if the specified file exists and is not a directory.

<a name="IsWindowsHost"></a>
## func IsWindowsHost

```go
func IsWindowsHost() bool
```

IsWindowsHost returns true if the current operating system is Windows.

<a name="RunCmd"></a>
## func RunCmd

```go
func RunCmd(name string, args ...string)
```

RunCmd executes an external command and pipes its output directly to the current process's stdout and stderr.

<a name="UnzipTarget"></a>
## func UnzipTarget

```go
func UnzipTarget(src string, dest string) error
```

UnzipTarget extracts a ZIP archive from src to the dest directory.

<a name="Config"></a>
## type Config

Config represents the parsed config.ini data.

```go
type Config struct {
    App     map[string]string
    Build   map[string]string
    Android map[string]string
    IOS     map[string]string
}
```

<a name="LoadConfig"></a>
### func LoadConfig

```go
func LoadConfig() *Config
```

LoadConfig reads and parses config.ini from the current directory.

<a name="Config.GetOrDefault"></a>
### func \(\*Config\) GetOrDefault

```go
func (c *Config) GetOrDefault(section, key, defaultValue string) string
```

GetOrDefault returns the value for a key in a section, or a default value if not found.
